title: Clean and filter customer data
description: Remove customers with null email addresses and filter to only active customers (status = 'active'). Drop duplicate customer records based on customer_id. Write the cleaned dataset to the customers_clean Delta Lake table.
acceptance_criteria: No null email_address values in output
Only records with status = 'active' are included
Output written to Delta Lake at gs://processed/customers_clean

title: Join orders with customers and aggregate monthly revenue
description: Join the orders table with the customers table on customer_id. Filter to orders placed in the last 90 days. Aggregate total revenue and order count by customer_region and month. Upsert results into the monthly_revenue_summary Delta Lake table.
acceptance_criteria: Join is a left join preserving all orders
Only orders from last 90 days included
Delta merge upsert on (region, year, month) key

title: Amazon iPhone 17 campaign — RFM segmentation and geo analytics
description: Build an RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) customer segmentation pipeline for the iPhone 17 launch campaign. Source data: customer transactions table and customer profile table. Steps: (1) calculate recency in days since last purchase, frequency as order count, monetary as total spend; (2) assign RFM scores 1-5 using ntile; (3) classify customers into High/Medium/Low value segments; (4) join with customer profile to get shipping_region; (5) aggregate segment counts and revenue by region; (6) upsert final campaign intent scores to campaign_rfm_segments Delta table.
acceptance_criteria: RFM scores calculated correctly using ntile(5) window functions
Customers segmented into High (RFM >= 12), Medium (>= 8), Low (< 8)
Delta merge on customer_id as key
Schema includes: customer_id, rfm_score, segment, shipping_region, total_revenue
